name: Shy Gal TF / Transformation / Mental Change
description:
(CW: Transformation, limited mental change)

Become the mask! Live your life as a brand-new, adorasexy Shy Gal in the world of Super Mario. Just make sure to pick a personality you like, since it'll be yours forever!

Note: Thank you to @argylefelix for the idea! I forgot I wanted to do one of these until you mentioned it.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
